confirm_email.title: Check your email
confirm_email.message: We sent you a confirmation link. Click it to complete your registration.
confirm_email.spam_hint: If you don’t see the email, check your spam folder.

login.title: Sign in
login.email_not_confirmed: Email is not confirmed. Please check your inbox and confirm your registration.

password_rules.letters: At least one uppercase and one lowercase letter

reset_password.title: Reset your password
reset_password.description: Enter your email address and we’ll send you a link to reset your password.

success.title: Check your email
success.message: We’ve sent you a link to reset your password. After clicking it, you’ll be able to set a new password.
success.spam_hint: If you don’t see the email, check your spam folder.

success.title: Password changed
success.message: Your password has been successfully changed.

errors.same_as_old: New password should be different from the old password.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account, security, and other settings.
